untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit trend line identification and cup-with-handle pattern recognition (visual pattern analysis). The entry condition 'Price closes above the trend line drawn down from the handle' and 'Look to the left of the cup to identify if another handle resembles the one on the right' cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators without pattern detection logic. The measured move down calculation also requires prior swing identification. Substitute entry uses pivot cross as directional proxy, but this does not capture the full pattern semantics.
translation_notes: This is a complex visual pattern (inverted cup-with-handle / head-and-shoulders top variant) that requires manual pattern detection or advanced pattern recognition not available in the indicator set. The entry/exit conditions reference a manually-drawn trend line from the handle, which cannot be derived from standard technical indicators alone. The measured move exit also requires identifying the first leg decline magnitude. A complete translation would require: (1) cup bottom detection, (2) handle formation identification, (3) trend line extraction, and (4) measured move calculation—none of which are supported by the allowed indicator set. The backtest engine would need pattern recognition capabilities or user-supplied trendline levels as external inputs.
